note: Appending a cell to a row is unusual — normally cells are seeded at row-Add time. This op exists for completeness.

fill.description: cell background fill. Accepts a solid color (hex, named, rgb(...)), 'none' for explicit no-fill, or a gradient string 'COLOR1-COLOR2[-ANGLE]' (e.g. 'FF0000-0000FF-90'). Stored as a:solidFill / a:gradFill / a:noFill on a:tcPr.
fill.readback: #RRGGBB uppercase, 'gradient' (with separate 'gradient' key), or 'image' for picture fill
